name: Windy Pro Engine (CPU INT8)

ct2_int8.note: CTranslate2 4.7.1 incompatible with transformers 4.45.1 (dtype kwarg error). GPU safetensors variant is built and certified. CT2 export deferred until library version reconciliation.

examination_log.notes: Attempted to pull weights from HuggingFace. Result: repo_not_found_on_hf. The actual weights likely live only on Kit OC1's original build machine and were never uploaded. Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C) on 2026-04-11.
